name: multi-cube-face-letter-assignment
author: Sebastian Lasowski
description: Constraint-based lightweight model for assigning letters to visible faces of multiple 3D cubes under strict symbolic and spatial consistency rules.

evaluation.score: high consistency on synthetic constraint dataset

notes: Developed under Terraforming-Planet initiative. Focus on structured reasoning with ultra-efficient parameter usage for Parameter Golf challenge. Model optimized for size-performance tradeoff and further compression.
